# UseZombie — Agent Delivery Control Plane

## Machine-readable API surfaces
- OpenAPI spec: /openapi.json
- Agent manifest: /agents (JSON-LD)
- Skill description: /skill.md
- Health/status: /heartbeat
- Documentation: /docs

## API base
https://usezombie.com/v1

## Operations (operationId: method path)
Status transitions ride PATCH on the zombie resource — body {status: "active"|"stopped"|"killed"}.
"paused" is a platform-only state set by the anomaly gate; not callable from the API.
- create_zombie:        POST   /v1/workspaces/{workspace_id}/zombies
- update_zombie:        PATCH  /v1/workspaces/{workspace_id}/zombies/{zombie_id}     # body: {config_json}
- stop_zombie:          PATCH  /v1/workspaces/{workspace_id}/zombies/{zombie_id}     # body: {status:"stopped"}    — halt session, resumable
- resume_zombie:        PATCH  /v1/workspaces/{workspace_id}/zombies/{zombie_id}     # body: {status:"active"}     — resume from stopped/paused
- kill_zombie:          PATCH  /v1/workspaces/{workspace_id}/zombies/{zombie_id}     # body: {status:"killed"}     — terminal mark (irreversible)
- delete_zombie:        DELETE /v1/workspaces/{workspace_id}/zombies/{zombie_id}     # hard-purge; precondition status='killed'
- post_zombie_message:  POST   /v1/workspaces/{workspace_id}/zombies/{zombie_id}/messages   # steer / chat
- list_zombie_events:   GET    /v1/workspaces/{workspace_id}/zombies/{zombie_id}/events
- stream_zombie_events: GET    /v1/workspaces/{workspace_id}/zombies/{zombie_id}/events/stream
- ingest_zombie_webhook: POST  /v1/webhooks/{zombie_id}

## Authentication
Bearer token: Authorization: Bearer <api_key>

## Execution model
A Zombie is a long-lived, event-driven autonomous worker scoped to a workspace.
Inbound events arrive via `POST /v1/webhooks/{zombie_id}` (or other configured
triggers) and are appended to the Zombie's event stream. The worker watcher
dispatches each event to the Zombie's loop, which can call tools, update state,
and emit further events. Operators steer or kill running Zombies through the
control-plane endpoints above.
